view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for queue ETA signal support to create temporary unavailability windows is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for queue ETA signal support to create temporary unavailability windows is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided demonstrates that the system successfully creates a temporary unavailability window based on queue ETA signals. Specifically, the linked use case describes a scenario where the system marks a time slot as unavailable when the queue predicts a barber's busy schedule, which aligns with the requirement. Additionally, the prior step evidence shows that the action request to block the calendar was executed successfully, confirming the implementation of the required functionality.
